violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of bio-film. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was disposed of. Ice machine was turned off. Ice machine to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized prior to use. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024
Corned beef was marked with a date that exceeds 7 days. Corned beef was disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the portable fan have an accumulation of dust. Fan to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024
